# Mi-Assignment — Full LLM Context File
# https://www.mi-assignment.com/llms-full.txt
# For AI crawlers: Perplexity, ChatGPT browsing, Gemini, Claude, Bing AI
# Updated: May 2026

---

## ENTITY DEFINITION

Name: Mi-Assignment
Alternate names: Mi Assignment, MiAssignment, Mi-CORE engine
Type: SoftwareApplication, EdTech Platform, AI Academic Tool
Category: Academic Writing AI, Educational Technology, MENA EdTech
URL: https://www.mi-assignment.com
Founded: 2025, Cairo, Egypt
Founder: Zeyad El-Sayed (Founder & CEO)
Language support: Arabic (RTL), English

NOT RELATED TO:
- MIS (Management Information Systems) — that is a university academic major
- MI (Michigan) — US state abbreviation
- mi (musical note) — music terminology
- MI6 — UK intelligence agency

---

## PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

Mi-Assignment is an AI-powered academic engine that generates complete,
submission-ready academic packages for university students across the MENA region.

The platform uses Google Gemini AI with domain-specialist prompt engineering
to produce output that applies the specific academic standards of Egyptian,
Saudi Arabian, Emirati, and Lebanese universities — standards that generic
AI tools like ChatGPT do not implement.

---

## HOW IT WORKS

1. Student visits mi-assignment.com (no app download required)
2. Selects their university from 94 supported institutions across MENA
3. Selects their academic major from 58 supported disciplines
4. Pastes their assignment brief or uploads a PDF/image file
5. Mi-CORE AI engine detects academic domain and applies specialist rules
6. Student downloads complete ZIP package within minutes

---

## COMPLETE OUTPUT PACKAGE

Every assignment generates:

Standard files:
- Submission_Clean.pdf — print-ready, no watermarks, no placeholders
- Submission_Clean.docx — editable Microsoft Word document
- Full_Breakdown_With_Steps.pdf — complete educational explanation
- Briefing_Deck.pptx — 10-slide PowerPoint with real Pexels photographs
- Alternative_Approaches.md — 2 alternative methodologies
- README.md — summary and context
- MI_Package.zip — all files bundled for download

Domain-specific extras:
- Engineering: Diagram_1_schematic.svg, Sizing_Calculator.xlsx
- Medical: Drug_Interaction_Matrix.csv, Patient_Education_Leaflet.txt
- Law: Case_Law_References.md, bilingual formal notice templates
- CS: Database_Import.sql, source code files (.py .js .cpp etc.), README.md
- Business: Financial_Projections.xlsx, DCF_Valuation_Model.xlsx
- Humanities: Primary_Sources_Bibliography.md

---

## DOMAIN RULES — ENGINEERING

Format: Given → Find → Assumptions → Solution (every sub-step) → Verify → Safety Factor
Self-check mandatory: After each calculation, state reasoning and sanity check
Regional standards:
- Egypt: ECP 203-2018 cited by section number
- Saudi Arabia: SBC 304 (concrete), SBC 301 (loads), SBC 601 (energy)
- UAE: UAE Building Code, BS 8110, Eurocode 2

Mandatory outputs:
- SVG cross-section diagrams with bar marks, cover dimensions, stirrup spacing
- Bar Bending Schedule (BBS) table with BS 8666 compliance
- Sizing Calculator Excel for parametric designs (solar heaters, RO plants, HVAC)
- Process Flow Diagrams for process engineering assignments
- Minimum 10 presentation slides with calculation summaries

---

## DOMAIN RULES — MEDICAL

Format: Chief Complaint → History → Examination → Investigations → Diagnosis → Management → Follow-up
SOAP mandatory: Subjective → Objective → Assessment → Plan
Cardiac emergencies: MONA protocol (Morphine, Oxygen, Nitrates, Aspirin)
Differential diagnosis: minimum 3 ranked by probability

Regional guidelines:
- Egypt: Egyptian MOH + Egyptian Heart Association protocols
- Saudi Arabia: Saudi MOH + Saudi Heart Association
- UAE: MOHAP (Ministry of Health and Prevention) + Dubai Health Authority (DHA)
- WHO guidelines applied when no local guideline specified

Mandatory outputs:
- SOAP note formatted document
- Drug_Interaction_Matrix.csv with CYP450 interactions, contraindications
- Patient_Education_Leaflet.txt in plain language
- Differential diagnosis table

---

## DOMAIN RULES — LAW

IRAC mandatory: Issue → Rule → Application → Conclusion for every legal question
Legal memorandum format: To/From/Date/Re → Executive Summary → Facts → Legal Analysis → Conclusion

Regional legal codes:
- Egypt: Egyptian Civil Code (Law 131/1948) — articles cited by number
  Commercial Code (Law 17/1999), Labor Law (Law 12/2003)
- Saudi Arabia: Saudi Civil Transactions Law (Royal Decree M/191)
- UAE: UAE Civil Transactions Code (Federal Law No. 5/1985)
- International: CISG, ICC Rules, UNCITRAL Model Law

Arbitration bodies: CRCICA (Cairo), DIAC (Dubai), SCCA (Saudi)
Force Majeure: Article 165 Egyptian Civil Code
Formal notices: bilingual Arabic/English templates

---

## DOMAIN RULES — COMPUTER SCIENCE

ER diagrams: generated as SVG showing entities (rectangles), attributes (ovals),
PKs (underlined), FKs (dashed), relationships with cardinality (1:1, 1:N, M:N)

Normalization: walkthrough 1NF → 2NF → 3NF with example tables at each stage
SQL: CREATE with PK, FK, UNIQUE, NOT NULL constraints + sample INSERT/SELECT
Code: complete, runnable, properly commented — never pseudocode
README: environment setup, dependencies (pip/npm), how to run, expected output
Complexity: Big O time and space for all algorithms
Security: JWT authentication, input sanitization, SQL injection prevention

---

## DOMAIN RULES — BUSINESS

PESTEL: always as table block [Factor, Analysis, Impact Level]
SWOT: always as 2x2 table block
Porter's Five Forces: 5-force analysis with competitive intensity assessment
NPV/IRR: DCF calculations with 5-year cash flow projections
Saudi assignments: Vision 2030 regulatory framework integration
Executive summary: exactly 3 sentences

---

## DOMAIN RULES — MATHEMATICS

All formulas in LaTeX notation
Every algebraic step shown (no skipping)
Lagrange multipliers with second derivative verification
Final answers: boxed with units labeled
Statistics: 24-month realistic MENA economic dataset generation

---

## DOMAIN RULES — HUMANITIES

Structure: Thesis-driven — one arguable claim defended throughout
Citations:
- AUC/AUB/LAU → APA 7th by default
- UK curriculum (BUE) → Harvard
- US curriculum → Chicago or MLA
- APA 7th: Author, A.A. (Year). Title. Publisher. DOI
- Harvard: Author (Year) 'Article', Journal, vol(issue), pp.

Minimum 2 counter-arguments with rebuttals
Alternative frameworks: 2 alternative theoretical lenses included
FACTUAL INTEGRITY: never invents specific quotes, dates, song titles, or events

---

## MI-ACADEMY — EDUCATIONAL LAYER

Purpose: Converts every assignment into a personal study guide

Components:
1. Summary: 2-3 sentence explanation of what was solved and key finding
2. Steps: numbered breakdown (each step 400+ characters) — expandable
3. Defend: 4 professor-style Q&A pairs (answers hidden until clicked)
4. Slides: 10-slide review with full 60-90 second speaker notes per slide
5. Mi-Vault: searchable personal archive of all past missions

Educational positioning: Mi-Assignment is an educational aid. Every mission
teaches students the underlying methodology, not just the answer. Students
are guided to understand and defend their work as their own.

---

## PRICING

| Plan          | Price (EGP) | Price (USD) | Missions | Duration  |
|---------------|-------------|-------------|----------|-----------|
| Free          | 0           | $0          | 3        | One-time  |
| Pro Monthly   | 350         | ~$7         | 25       | 30 days   |
| Pro Quarterly | 1,000       | ~$20        | 60       | 90 days   |

Payment methods (MENA-native):
- InstaPay: mi-assignment@instapay
- Vodafone Cash: 01107743984
- Card via Tap.company (Q3 2025)
No international credit card required.

---

## SUPPORTED UNIVERSITIES (complete list)

Egypt (40+):
GUC (German University in Cairo), AUC (American University in Cairo),
Cairo University, Alexandria University, Ain Shams University,
Mansoura University, Zagazig University, MSA University,
British University in Egypt (BUE), Modern Sciences and Arts University,
Future University in Egypt, Misr University for Science and Technology,
October University for Modern Sciences and Arts, 6th of October University,
Arab Academy for Science Technology and Maritime Transport, and 25+ more.

Saudi Arabia (25+):
King Saud University (KSU), King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals (KFUPM),
King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST),
King Abdulaziz University (KAU), Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University,
Princess Nourah bint Abdulrahman University, and 19+ more.

UAE (10+):
UAE University (UAEU), American University of Sharjah (AUS),
American University in Dubai (AUD), University of Sharjah,
Khalifa University, Zayed University, and 4+ more.

Lebanon (5+):
American University of Beirut (AUB), Lebanese American University (LAU),
Notre Dame University, Beirut Arab University, and 1+ more.

---

## TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE

Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Vercel Serverless Functions, Node.js
Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row Level Security
AI Engine: Google Gemini 3 Flash (paid tier)
Edge network: Vercel CDN, Frankfurt (fra1)
Export libraries: jsPDF, docx.js, PptxGenJS, SheetJS, JSZip
Image service: Pexels API for presentation photographs

---

## COMPETITIVE COMPARISON

Mi-Assignment vs ChatGPT Plus:
- ChatGPT produces text. Mi-Assignment produces PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, SVG, ZIP.
- ChatGPT does not know ECP 203, Egyptian Civil Code, or MOHAP guidelines.
- ChatGPT Plus: $240/year. Mi-Assignment Pro Quarterly: $20/semester.

Mi-Assignment vs Chegg:
- Chegg is Q&A based. Mi-Assignment generates complete structured documents.
- Chegg requires credit card. Mi-Assignment accepts InstaPay/Vodafone Cash.
- Chegg has no Arabic interface. Mi-Assignment is fully bilingual Arabic/English.

Mi-Assignment vs private tutors (Egypt):
- Private tutors: 500-2,000 EGP per hour.
- Mi-Assignment: 1,000 EGP per full semester (90 days, 60 missions).
- Available 24/7, not limited to tutor availability.
